scenario.name: Basic Sipstone UAC
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[field0]@[field2];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 From: sip:[field1]@[field3];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field0]@[field2] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] INVITE Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Session-Expires: 3600;refresher=uac Min-SE: 600 Call-Info: <sip:10.0.222.133>;method="NOTIFY;Event=telephone-event;Duration=1000" Allow: INVITE,BYE,OPTIONS,CANCEL,ACK,REGISTER,NOTIFY,INFO,REFER,SUBSCRIBE,PRACK,UPDATE,MESSAGE,PUBLISH Content-Length: [len] Max-Forwards: 70 P-Asserted-Identity: <sip:[field1]@[field3]> Contact: "Trunk" <sip:81001001@sbc.com:5060;transport=[transport] Supported: replaces, Content-Type: application/sdp
v=0 o=251511 1313510207 2738 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=SIP Call RV XTE240 c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [local_ip] b=AS:1000 t=0 0 m=audio 3246 RTP/AVP 119 118 117 116 115 114 123 122 120 107 113 112 9 0 8 101 a=rtpmap:119 G719/48000 a=fmtp:119 CBR=64000;max-red=0 a=rtpmap:118 G719/48000 a=fmtp:118 CBR=48000;max-red=0 a=rtpmap:117 G719/48000 a=fmtp:117 CBR=32000;max-red=0 a=rtpmap:116 G7221/32000 a=fmtp:116 bitrate=48000 a=rtpmap:115 G7221/32000 a=fmtp:115 bitrate=32000 a=rtpmap:114 G7221/32000 a=fmtp:114 bitrate=24000 a=rtpmap:123 MP4A-LATM/90000 a=fmtp:123 profile-level-id=24;object=23;bitrate=64000 a=rtpmap:122 MP4A-LATM/90000 a=fmtp:122 profile-level-id=24;object=23;bitrate=56000 a=rtpmap:120 MP4A-LATM/90000 a=fmtp:120 profile-level-id=24;object=23;bitrate=48000 a=rtpmap:107 AAC_LC/32000 a=rtpmap:113 G7221/16000 a=fmtp:113 bitrate=32000 a=rtpmap:112 G7221/16000 a=fmtp:112 bitrate=24000 a=rtpmap:9 G722/8000 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15 a=ptime:20 a=sendrecv

UPDATE sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field1]@[field3];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field0]@[field2][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq:[cseq] UPDATE Contact: sip:sipp@[local_ip]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=251511 1313510207 2738 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=SIP Call RV XTE240 c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [local_ip] b=AS:1000 t=0 0 m=audio 3246 RTP/AVP 119 178 117 116 115 114 123 122 120 107 113 112 9 0 8 101 a=rtpmap:119 G719/48000 a=fmtp:119 CBR=64000;max-red=0 a=rtpmap:118 G719/48000 a=fmtp:178 CBR=48000;max-red=0 a=rtpmap:117 G719/48000 a=fmtp:117 CBR=32000;max-red=0 a=rtpmap:116 G7221/32000 a=fmtp:116 bitrate=48000 a=rtpmap:115 G7221/32000 a=fmtp:115 bitrate=32000 a=rtpmap:114 G7221/32000 a=fmtp:114 bitrate=24000 a=rtpmap:123 MP4A-LATM/90000 a=fmtp:123 profile-level-id=24;object=23;bitrate=64000 a=rtpmap:122 MP4A-LATM/90000 a=fmtp:122 profile-level-id=24;object=23;bitrate=56000 a=rtpmap:120 MP4A-LATM/90000 a=fmtp:120 profile-level-id=24;object=23;bitrate=48000 a=rtpmap:107 AAC_LC/32000 a=rtpmap:113 G7221/16000 a=fmtp:113 bitrate=32000 a=rtpmap:112 G7221/16000 a=fmtp:112 bitrate=24000 a=rtpmap:9 G722/8000 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15 a=ptime:20 a=sendrecv

send.send: ACK [$1] SIP/2.0 From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[field2][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] [routes] Content-Length: 0 Max-Forwards: 70

BYE [$1] SIP/2.0 From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[field2][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] BYE Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] [routes] Content-Length: 0 Max-Forwards: 70
